title: Hostess 7 imaging — Imagine + NEXUS combinatronic + exact-text code
motto: Grok Imagine for scenes · PIL/HTML for exact text · combinatronic for every field asset.

skills.label: Choose the right imaging tool
rules: No source image → image_gen (invented subjects, base frames).
Source image → image_edit (restyle, add/remove, likeness, iterate).
Named real person → image_edit with verified reference only — never pure gen.
Exact text, charts, tables, labels → build with PIL or HTML/CSS code — not image models.
Video → image_to_video from a staged frame; ffmpeg concat -c copy to assemble shots.

skills.label: NEXUS combinatronic visuals
skills.repair: field-combinatronic-visuals.py repair — rebuild broken PNGs from seeds, never hand-edit.

skills.label: Field file format icons
skills.note: 64×64 PNG per format id — sovereign badge, family color.

skills.label: Big Drive device grids
skills.hero: PIL overlay for exact BIG DRIVE branding on reference photos

skills.label: Hostess7 Graphics window
skills.note: Lossless RGB framebuffer — pixels and TTF text for Talk+Graphics path.

skills.label: AmmoOS Image bridge
skills.note: GIMP-Field sovereign image formats — magics, lossless field layers.

work_sources.note: inventory() returns broken_rows — repair rebuilds from seeds

assistant_help.statement: When combinatronic inventory shows broken assets, run repair. When new tools ship (Big Drive, formats), regenerate device grids and format icons. Teach Imagine corpus after skill updates.
